resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-calendar-dividends
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool dividend calendar
resourceTemplates.description: Returns ex-dividend dates and dividend amounts for a given year. The year parameter can be a specific year (e.g. 2026) or 'initial' for the current year ±1 year.

resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-calendar-earnings-week
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool earnings calendar (weekly)
resourceTemplates.description: Returns all earnings reports scheduled in the week containing the provided date (YYYY-MM-DD).

resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-calendar-earnings-symbol
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool earnings calendar by symbol
resourceTemplates.description: Returns upcoming and historical earnings dates for a specific company identified by its ticker symbol.

resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-calendar-earnings-surprises
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool earnings surprises
resourceTemplates.description: Returns historical earnings surprise data for a company, including EPS estimates, actual EPS, differences and surprise percentages.
